title: gardenia cinerascens
intro: Gardenia cinerascens, also known as the yellow gardenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gardenia cinerascens include treating fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as having antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of Gardenia cinerascens can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
